title: Delicate Dutch Oxtail Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring oxtail, mustard, and spring vegetables, all wrapped in a corn husk vessel. This dish is perfect for a monsoon day.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the mustard, thyme, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the oxtail pieces to the bowl and coat with the mustard mixture.
Wrap each piece of oxtail in a corn husk, making sure to seal the edges.
Place the wrapped oxtail in a large Dutch oven and add the spring onions, carrots, and potatoes.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Braise the stew for 2 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh thyme.
